title: Moviemaker
description: Moviemaker - everything for creativity! Build with new blocks, record video inside game, transforms into anything, create multi-functional NPCs, models and much more!
body:
## **About🎬:** ![forge](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/8457cf2b01e18302ef61da3256328bfb4b94ad14.png) ![neo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/2ae6da320fc6a989056373e3b94d195992f05343_0.webp)
Moviemaker is a mod that should improve the creative gaming experience in minecraft. It has many features for creating animations, building maps and other creative tasks. Built-in MoLang compiler(based on [Molang-Compiler](https://github.com/Ocelot5836/molang-compiler/tree/master)).
Supports [FFmpeg](https://ffmpeg.org/) and record/edit audio and video with it.
**It doesn't support Optifine, use [Embeddium](https://modrinth.com/mod/embeddium) & [Oculus](https://modrinth.com/mod/oculus) on forge and [Sodium](https://modrinth.com/mod/sodium) & [Iris](https://modrinth.com/mod/iris) on fabric.** Inspired by [BBS](https://modrinth.com/mod/bbs-mod) and [Blockbuster](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/blockbuster) mods 💖. ## **Features⭐:** ### **Morphing:** Morph into any entities, blocks, items.
![0](https://github.com/user-attachments/assets/b23da9cf-cc39-4c7c-ae97-7d07925bcca8)
The player will be able to use the abilities of morph-entities (e.g. jaw summoning when playing as evoker).
Morphs are compatible with shaders and dynamic light (Iris-only).
![1](https://github.com/user-attachments/assets/a4709d4b-7e0f-4b21-a5d2-3132f79a1f91)
Morph acquiring happens after taking certain actions(e.g kill entity), also you can set morph anytime using commands.
By turning on “Full morph camouflage” in the settings you can fully mimic the creature. In the future it will be possible to turn into particles and .obj/.json models. ### **Mini-block/Bits 🧱:** *Will be available in 0.3+* ### **Camera 📷:** *Will be available around version ~0.4+* ### **NPC 🤖:** *Will be available around version ~0.5+* ### **Recording 🎥:** *Will be available around version ~0.7+* ### **Additional:** - Allow place your own particle-emitters via loading bedrock-particles/“snowstorm” particles.✨ - Load textures, render them inside the game as a block. 🖼️ - Create textures and use them on the fly(not implemented). - Place .obj/.json models around the world as blocks/block-entities/entities(not implemented). - Transform(offset, scale, rotation) player model and them parts(0.2+). - Load and use .lua scripts for various purposes. - Place script blocks of various kinds for full control over the world(not implemented). - Can create custom light sources with different shape, color, intensity using the current shader-pack. 💡 *In which versions this will be added is not yet certain, but all features will definitely be in 1.0!* ### Customization: Creatures from other mods can be added to moviemaker tags to define their behavior. You can also create addons (or you can ask me to create them) to support abilities, variations, etc. Mod is open source, various addons, compat mods, resource packs are allowed.
